pattern:nestjs+mongo:required-bang.content: CRITICAL Mongoose TypeScript strict mode: @Prop({required:true}) → field!: Type  (exclamation mark, non-null assertion) @Prop() → field?: Type  (question mark, optional) NEVER: field: Type (without ! or ?)  NEVER use ! for optional fields or ? for required fields.

pattern:nestjs+mongo:no-findOneBy.content: CRITICAL: Mongoose does NOT have findOneBy(). This is TypeORM only. Mongoose methods: findById(id), findOne({field:value}), findByIdAndUpdate(), findByIdAndDelete(). If you see findOneBy in Mongoose code, replace with findById(id).

pattern:nestjs+mongo:correct-module.content: CRITICAL NestJS Mongoose module: imports: [MongooseModule.forFeature([{name: Book.name, schema: BookSchema}])] NEVER: TypeOrmModule.forFeature([Book]) in a Mongoose project. NEVER: MongooseModule.forRoot() in entity module (only in AppModule).

pattern:nestjs+mongodb:schema.content: // schema.ts: @Schema({timestamps:true}) class Book { @Prop({required:true}) title!: string; @Prop() description?: string; } // required→!, optional→?

pattern:nestjs+mongodb:service.content: // service.ts: @InjectModel(Book.name) private model: Model<BookDocument>. findAll(){return this.model.find().exec()} findOne(id){return this.model.findById(id).exec()} create(dto){return new this.model(dto).save()} update(id,dto){return this.model.findByIdAndUpdate(id,{$set:dto},{new:true}).exec()} remove(id){return this.model.findByIdAndDelete(id).exec()}
